Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=$SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT c.relname as table_name, p.polname as policy_name, p.polcmd::text as command, pg_get_expr\(p.polqual, p.polrelid\) as using_expr, pg_get_expr\(p.polwithcheck, p.polrelid\) as with_check, CASE WHEN p.polcmd::text IN \(''*'', ''a''\) AND pg_get_expr\(p.polwithcheck, p.polrelid\) IS NULL THEN ''MISSING WITH CHECK - INSERT WILL FAIL'' WHEN p.polcmd::text = ''w'' AND pg_get_expr\(p.polwithcheck, p.polrelid\) IS NULL THEN ''MISSING WITH CHECK - INSERT WILL FAIL'' ELSE ''OK'' END as status FROM pg_policy p JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid = p.polrelid WHERE c.relnamespace = ''public''::regnamespace ORDER BY c.relname, p.polname;")

Bash(SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=$SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN npx supabase db query --linked "SELECT c.relname as table_name, p.polname as policy_name, p.polcmd::text as command, CASE WHEN p.polcmd::text IN \(''*'', ''a''\) AND pg_get_expr\(p.polwithcheck, p.polrelid\) IS NULL THEN ''MISSING WITH CHECK'' WHEN p.polcmd::text = ''w'' AND pg_get_expr\(p.polwithcheck, p.polrelid\) IS NULL THEN ''MISSING WITH CHECK'' ELSE ''OK'' END as status FROM pg_policy p JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid = p.polrelid WHERE c.relnamespace = ''public''::regnamespace AND p.polcmd::text IN \(''*'', ''a'', ''w''\) ORDER BY status DESC, c.relname;")
